# Bad Fit Log

Log every prospect that turned out NOT to be a fit. Goal: stop wasting cycles
and feed the ICP Operating System.

## Format

```
- date: 2026-MM-DD
  company: <name>
  sector: <sector>
  reason: <why this was a bad fit>
  learning: <one sentence — what should change in ICP, sourcing, or message>
```
